endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.AzureData/operations
endpoints.description: Lists all of the available SQL Server Registration API operations.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.AzureData/sqlServerRegistrations
endpoints.description: Gets all SQL Server registrations in a subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.AzureData/sqlServerRegistrations
endpoints.description: Gets all SQL Server registrations in a resource group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.AzureData/sqlServerRegistrations/{sqlServerRegistrationName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SQLSERVERREGISTRATIONNAME}} with a real sqlserverregistrationname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.AzureData/sqlServerRegistrations/{sqlServerRegistrationName}
endpoints.description: Creates or updates a SQL Server registration.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SQLSERVERREGISTRATIONNAME}} with a real sqlserverregistrationname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.AzureData/sqlServerRegistrations/{sqlServerRegistrationName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SQLSERVERREGISTRATIONNAME}} with a real sqlserverregistrationname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: PATCH /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.AzureData/sqlServerRegistrations/{sqlServerRegistrationName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SQLSERVERREGISTRATIONNAME}} with a real sqlserverregistrationname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.AzureData/sqlServerRegistrations/{sqlServerRegistrationName}/sqlServers
endpoints.description: Gets all SQL Servers in a SQL Server Registration.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SQLSERVERREGISTRATIONNAME}} with a real sqlserverregistrationname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.AzureData/sqlServerRegistrations/{sqlServerRegistrationName}/sqlServers/{sqlServerName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SQLSERVERREGISTRATIONNAME}} with a real sqlserverregistrationname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{SQLSERVERNAME}} with a real sqlservername.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.AzureData/sqlServerRegistrations/{sqlServerRegistrationName}/sqlServers/{sqlServerName}
endpoints.description: Creates or updates a SQL Server.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SQLSERVERREGISTRATIONNAME}} with a real sqlserverregistrationname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{SQLSERVERNAME}} with a real sqlservername.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.AzureData/sqlServerRegistrations/{sqlServerRegistrationName}/sqlServers/{sqlServerName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SQLSERVERREGISTRATIONNAME}} with a real sqlserverregistrationname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{SQLSERVERNAME}} with a real sqlservername.
